name: Search and Rescue Thermal Survey & Wind Contingency
description: You are a Search and Rescue (SAR) Coordinator responding to an avalanche in a high alpine valley with high crosswinds. Using the specifications in the SAR operations brief at /home/ga/Documents/QGC/sar_ops_brief.txt, configure the drone parameters for high winds (WEATH_ENABLE = 1, RTL_SPEED = 1500 cm/s) and create a Survey mission plan in QGroundControl for the search area east of the launch point. The mission must use a Flir Vue Pro 640 camera configuration at 80m altitude with 80% frontal and 70% side overlap. Save the mission plan to /home/ga/Documents/QGC/avalanche_thermal_search.plan.
